services.title: On-Site Tech Support
services.headline: In-home help when you need it.
services.summary: House-call tech help when the issue spans computers, Wi-Fi, printers, or new devices and you want one visit to sort it out.

services.title: Virus & Malware Removal
services.headline: Remove infections and secure your system.
services.summary: Malware cleanup and post-remediation hardening for pop-ups, browser hijacks, suspicious logins, and other signs a computer may be compromised.

services.title: Wi-Fi & Network Setup
services.headline: Reliable Wi-Fi and network setup for homes and small offices.
services.summary: Router, mesh, access point, and wired network setup focused on coverage, speed, and reliability, with a secure baseline configuration included.

services.title: Home Network Security & Wi-Fi Hardening
services.headline: Make your home Wi-Fi and connected devices safer without making them harder to use.
services.summary: Router, Wi-Fi, and device hardening that improves settings, guest access, device separation, and overall home-network safety without turning the setup into a science project.

services.title: Scam & Fraud Protection
services.headline: Practical help spotting scams and protecting yourself online.
services.summary: Calm, practical scam-prevention help for households, retirees, caregivers, and small businesses that want help evaluating suspicious calls, texts, emails, websites, and payment requests.

services.title: Password Manager Setup & Account Safety
services.headline: Fix password confusion, MFA gaps, and risky account habits.
services.summary: Password manager setup, breach cleanup, MFA guidance, and safer account habits for households and small businesses that want fewer lockouts and less fraud risk.

services.title: Computer Repair
services.headline: Fix slow, crashing, or broken computers—fast.
services.summary: Diagnostics and repair for slow, crashing, overheating, or non-booting laptops and desktops, with honest repair guidance and data-safe troubleshooting.

services.title: Data Recovery & Backup Help
services.headline: Recover important files and stop future loss.
services.summary: Help with deleted files, failing drives, and non-booting systems when recovery is possible, plus backup setup to reduce the chance of doing this twice.

services.title: Laptop & PC Speed Upgrades
services.headline: Speed up a computer that is still worth keeping.
services.summary: SSD, RAM, battery, and thermal-service upgrades that improve speed, stability, and lifespan when the computer is worth keeping.

services.title: Software Troubleshooting & Installs
services.headline: Fix Windows and Mac software problems without a full wipe.
services.summary: Help with Windows and macOS update failures, driver problems, app crashes, login issues, and clean installs without defaulting to a full wipe.

services.title: Smart Home Setup & Security
services.headline: Set up cameras, doorbells, and smart devices with clearer privacy and fewer headaches.
services.summary: Help with cameras, doorbells, speakers, hubs, and routines so the setup is easier to manage, easier to share safely, and less likely to create privacy or access problems later.

services.title: Custom Technology Project Planning
services.headline: Start with a consultation when the job does not fit a standard service page.
services.summary: Project planning for home and small-business technology work that needs consultation before implementation, especially when privacy, networking, storage, access, or multi-device coordination are part of the job.
